title: Smart Commit: Refactor comparison metrics for body cap
original_text: Refactored commit_examples_data/compare_generator.py so body evaluation respects the current seven-bullet limit. The report now keeps legacy metrics while adding capped body count, capped line ratio, and capped coverage. Added tests/test_compare_generator.py to cover the capped metrics.
expected_subject: refactor(eval): add capped body comparison metrics
expected_body_lines: - Add capped body count and line-ratio metrics
- Add capped body coverage for seven generated bullets
- Cover capped comparison behavior with tests
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(eval): add capped body comparison metrics"
